name: Google
description: Google builds internet products across search, cloud, advertising, maps, video, and mobile platforms, with a strong focus on large-scale engineering and AI research.

name: TCS
description: Tata Consultancy Services delivers enterprise software, consulting, cloud transformation, and managed services for clients across banking, retail, telecom, and manufacturing.

name: Infosys
description: Infosys provides digital transformation, application development, data, cloud, and business process services to global organizations modernizing legacy systems.

name: Amazon
description: Amazon operates large e-commerce, logistics, cloud, devices, and digital media businesses, serving both consumers and enterprise customers at global scale.

name: Wipro
description: Wipro works across consulting, engineering, cloud, cybersecurity, and business operations, helping enterprises manage technology and long-term modernization programs.

name: Samsung
description: Samsung manufactures smartphones, semiconductors, displays, appliances, and consumer electronics, combining large-scale hardware production with product design and R&D.

name: Accenture
description: Accenture advises organizations on strategy, technology, operations, and digital transformation, often combining consulting with delivery and managed services.

name: Microsoft
description: Microsoft develops software, cloud services, developer tools, productivity products, business platforms, and AI offerings for consumers and enterprises.

name: Deloitte
description: Deloitte provides consulting, audit, risk, tax, and advisory services, helping large companies improve operations, compliance, finance, and digital capabilities.

name: Sony
description: Sony works across entertainment, gaming, imaging, music, film, and electronics, with a portfolio that combines consumer products and content businesses.

name: Flipkart
description: Flipkart runs a major online marketplace in India, supported by logistics, digital payments, merchandising, and category operations for large-scale retail.

name: Apple
description: Apple designs consumer devices, operating systems, software, and services with a strong emphasis on hardware integration, product design, and ecosystem control.

name: Cognizant
description: Cognizant supports enterprise clients with application services, consulting, cloud, data, quality engineering, and domain-focused digital transformation programs.

name: IBM
description: IBM serves businesses through enterprise software, infrastructure, consulting, automation, data, security, and long-standing research in computing systems.

name: Siemens
description: Siemens operates across industrial automation, mobility, infrastructure, healthcare technology, and software used in factories, utilities, and large public systems.

name: Oracle
description: Oracle delivers databases, enterprise applications, cloud infrastructure, and developer services for organizations running complex business and data workloads.

name: HCL Technologies
description: HCL Technologies works in engineering, cloud, infrastructure, software, and enterprise IT operations, often supporting large and distributed technology environments.

name: Toyota
description: Toyota produces passenger vehicles, commercial vehicles, and mobility technologies, with deep capabilities in manufacturing systems and supply chain discipline.

name: BMW
description: BMW builds premium cars and motorcycles while investing in electric mobility, manufacturing quality, connected services, and performance engineering.

name: Capgemini
description: Capgemini combines consulting, systems integration, engineering, and business services to help organizations modernize platforms and improve operations.

name: Meta
description: Meta develops social platforms, communication tools, ads technology, AI systems, and immersive computing products used by billions of people worldwide.

name: Tata Motors
description: Tata Motors manufactures passenger and commercial vehicles and continues to expand in electric mobility, fleet products, and transportation engineering.

name: SAP
description: SAP is known for enterprise software in finance, supply chain, HR, procurement, and business analytics used by large organizations worldwide.

name: Bosch
description: Bosch works across automotive systems, industrial technology, consumer goods, and smart building products, with strong engineering and manufacturing depth.

name: Salesforce
description: Salesforce offers cloud software for CRM, service, marketing, analytics, and application development, supporting customer-facing teams across industries.

name: Mahindra
description: Mahindra builds utility vehicles, farm equipment, and mobility solutions, supported by operations in manufacturing, engineering, and rural market distribution.

name: Adobe
description: Adobe creates tools for design, imaging, video, document workflows, digital marketing, and content production for creative and enterprise teams.

name: Tech Mahindra
description: Tech Mahindra serves telecom, enterprise, and digital transformation programs with application services, networks, cloud, and business process support.

name: Renault
description: Renault develops passenger vehicles and mobility solutions while working on manufacturing efficiency, electric platforms, and automotive engineering programs.

name: LG Electronics
description: LG Electronics produces appliances, displays, entertainment systems, and business technology products with a broad global manufacturing and retail footprint.
